docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-22-2011 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YAO, CAROLYN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TELLO, MICHAEL $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,030.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-22-2011 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-22-2011 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ONLY. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOTHING REPORTED. (506)
FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE ANNE-CHRISTINE MASSULLO ON 05/29/2024 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 68153.
